summary: venues-now and cuisine-bottleneck now dedupe by venue slug across sections of /v1/pages/restaurants.
reason: Wolt groups the same venue into multiple thematic sections (Featured, Top Rated, cuisine buckets). Without dedup, venues-now could return the same venue multiple times and cuisine-bottleneck would count one venue N times per tag, skewing VenueCount, OpenCount, and AvgETAMin. Verified live against Helsinki: 170 venues returned, 0 duplicate slugs.
